contact.name: Full Name

contact.success: Your message has been sent! Thank you.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
contact.errInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.errMessageShort: Your message must be at least 10 characters.
contact.errMessageLong: Your message can be at most 2000 characters.
contact.errNameLong: Name can be at most 100 characters.
contact.errSubjectLong: Subject can be at most 200 characters.
contact.errCooldown: Please wait at least {minutes} more minute(s) before sending another message.
contact.errTooFast: Form was submitted too quickly. Please try again.
contact.captchaPending: Please wait for the security check to complete.
contact.captchaFailed: Security check failed. Please try again.
contact.captchaErrInvalid: The security check could not be verified. Refresh the page, pause ad blockers or strict privacy extensions for this site, then try again.
contact.captchaErrTimeout: The security check expired or was already used. Please complete it again and submit.
contact.captchaErrNetwork: Could not reach the verification service. Check your connection and try again.
